title: erucastrum erucoides
intro: Erucastrum erucoides, also known as Rocket Cress or Small Cress, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a biennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Erucastrum erucoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
